_doctrine: Seed-and-track: named theses you proposed, tracked going forward. currently_firing = conditions live now. fire_sweeps = how many sweeps it's fired total. Scoring vs realized turns accrues over time — the euphoria thesis can't be backtested (too few tops), so we let the future grade it. Edit hypotheses.json to add your own.

euphoria_sequence_stage1_meme.thesis: SOL diverging from BTC (meme season) is the first leg toward a euphoric top

euphoria_sequence_stage2_alt.thesis: Both SOL and ETH diverging (alt season) means we're mid-to-late in the run to the top

euphoria_blowoff.thesis: Both alts diverging hard while BTC extended = blow-off zone

classic_top_froth.thesis: Extreme greed + funding blown out + BTC stretched = classic top froth

generational_bottom.thesis: Extreme fear + BTC at/below 200wk floor = generational accumulation
